treatment_information.treatment_response: INR was consistently 1.6, indicating sub-therapeutic levels.

treatment_timeline.event: Initially admitted with a low INR
4 mg of Warfarin administered; INR measured at 1.6
Heparin started due to sub-therapeutic INR

patient_outcome.final_status: Alert and oriented, ambulating with steady gait
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow-up appointment with cardiac surgery office to discuss driving clearance.
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Healing well with no erythema or drainage at sternal incision.
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Sternal pain managed with oral analgesics; edema not present.
